ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist is associated with */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the artist */,
  "deathdate" TEXT /* Death date of the artist (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the artist */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the artist */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the album (e.g., LP, CD, digital) */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the label that released the album */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Producer of the album */,
  "engineer" TEXT /* Recording engineer of the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  "catalog_number" TEXT /* Catalog number of the album */,
  "upc_ean" TEXT /* UPC or EAN code of the album */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the label is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the label was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the label */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the label */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the label */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the label */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the label record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the label record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_artists" (
  "album_artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album-artist relationship */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the artist on the album (e.g., composer, performer) */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number of the artist's contribution (if applicable) */,
  "track_title" TEXT /* Title of the track (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album-artist relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album-artist relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_artists_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_artists_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the flag image of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the label that released the album */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country of origin */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year of release */,
  "upc_ean" TEXT /* UPC or EAN code of the release */,
  "barcode" TEXT /* Barcode of the release */,
  "is_reissue" INTEGER /* Indicates if the release is a reissue */,
  "is_remaster" INTEGER /* Indicates if the release is a remaster */,
  "is_deluxe" INTEGER /* Indicates if the release is a deluxe edition */,
  "is_limited_edition" INTEGER /* Indicates if the release is a limited edition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the release record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the release record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id")
)
